description_long: This is a modern, three-seat sofa with a dark, textured fabric upholstery and a high, rectangular backrest on one end, creating an asymmetrical silhouette. The seat and back cushions are integrated into the frame, giving the sofa a streamlined and monolithic appearance. Both armrests are wide, flat, and padded, extending slightly beyond the seat width for added comfort. The sofa's base is solid and continuous, with no visible legs, suggesting a sturdy and grounded design. The upholstery appears to be a dark charcoal or black woven fabric, with a subtle, uniform texture throughout. The overall form is boxy and geometric, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic suitable for urban public spaces.
description: A dark, boxy three-seat sofa with integrated cushions, wide padded armrests, and a high backrest on one end, upholstered in textured fabric. The design is modern, monolithic, and well-suited for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat sections, wide armrests, and a tall backrest on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the tall backrest, and the thick armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, flat back panel and the asymmetrical height of the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lower armrest and the sofa's solid, blocky construction.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, attached seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all integrated into the frame with no visible separation; the backrest on one end is extended and higher.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, wide, flat, and padded, extending slightly above the seat height with a straight, blocky profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the sofa base is a continuous, solid plinth that sits directly on the ground, giving a grounded and monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is high, straight, and continuous, with one end significantly taller than the other, forming an asymmetrical profile; cushions are attached and flush with the frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is a solid, dark fabric with a subtle, uniform woven texture and no visible decorative stitching or patterning.
